_patch_meta.produced_by: Claude Code (recovery of lost VCREVISE OP-003..OP-010)
_patch_meta.description: CC-produced recovery patch. The original VCREVISE (PATCH-20260424-134-VCREVISE-V1) declared 8 UPDATE ops targeting mti=1098 NULL-skeleton rows for set_aside_reason backfill. M39 (deleted 22,333 strict NULL-skeleton verse_context rows) ran before VCREVISE and removed those target rows, so the 8 UPDATE ops matched 0 rows silently. This recovery patch re-expresses those 8 classifications as INSERT operations so the researcher's explicit set-aside decisions are recorded. vc_status is already vc_completed for mti=1098 and md_version=2; applicator will re-validate and bump md_version to 3 on apply.

record.notes: Literal change(s) of clothes given as gifts (Joseph to his brothers). Reason backfilled on VC v3_4 re-evaluation per §3.2 — set_aside_reason was NULL from pre-VCB-032 classification. Verse remains set aside; no change in is_relevant state. Recorded via VCRECOVERY after VCREVISE OP-003 lost on M39 cleanup.
